candidate_definition_hints.text: This is an official implementation of facial landmark detection for our TPAMI paper "Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Visual Recognition". https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.07919
- [2020/03/13] Our paper is accepted by TPAMI: [Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Visual Recognition](https://arxiv.org/pdf/1908.07919.pdf).
